conversation.speaker: Employee
conversation.text: Hi there! Can I help you find anything today?

conversation.speaker: Customer
conversation.text: Yes, please. I'm looking for the pasta and rice aisle. I also wanted to check if there are any special offers.

conversation.speaker: Employee
conversation.text: Sure! The pasta and rice are in aisle 7, right in the middle. As for offers, we have a 'buy one, get one free' deal on our own-brand pasta sauces this week.

conversation.speaker: Customer
conversation.text: Oh, that's great! Are the sauces in the same aisle?

conversation.speaker: Employee
conversation.text: They're actually in aisle 8, next to the pasta. But I can show you if you like.

conversation.speaker: Customer
conversation.text: That's okay, I think I can find it. Is there a discount on rice as well?

conversation.speaker: Employee
conversation.text: Yes, the long-grain rice is on sale. It's 20% off the usual price. The price tags with red labels are all the special offers.

conversation.speaker: Customer
conversation.text: Perfect, thank you so much for your help!

conversation.speaker: Employee
conversation.text: You're welcome! Have a nice day.

questions.question: What is the customer looking for?
What is the special offer on pasta sauce?
options: Three for the price of two

questions.question: Where can the customer find the special offer items?
options: At the front of the store

questions.question: What does the employee offer to do for the customer?
options: Show them the pasta sauce aisle
